creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fredrik Eriksson from comment #0)

Hi Fredrik, thank you for the detailed report and your findings!

It looks like www/py-graphiql-debug-toolbar has stopped working with the 4.4.6 upgrade of www/py-django-debug-toolbar in ports f8392fba5cb4.  I committed a workaround which should solve the problem.

I'll try to report this issue to upstream in the next few days and leave this bug open for reference during this time.
